# Gappsy

> Gappsy is a directory of business and marketing software tools, with independent, DB-verified comparison pages covering pricing, features, and head-to-head verdicts to help buyers pick the right tool.

> All facts on tool and comparison pages (pricing, ratings, platform support, feature availability) are sourced directly from Gappsy's own database, not inferred.

## Categories

- [Accounting](https://www.gappsy.com/tool-categories/accounting/)
- [AI](https://www.gappsy.com/tool-categories/ai/)
- [AI Chatbots](https://www.gappsy.com/tool-categories/ai-chatbots/)

## Tools

- [1Password](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/1password/): A password manager and secrets platform storing logins, payment info, and sensitive data with end-to-end AES 256-bit encryption and secure sharing.
- [7shifts](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/7shifts/): 7shifts is employee scheduling, time tracking, and team communication software built specifically for restaurants.
- [8x8](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/8x8/): 8x8 is a cloud communications platform combining VoIP business phone, video meetings, team chat, and contact center (CCaaS) software in one suite.
- [AccuRanker](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/accuranker/): AccuRanker is a rank tracking platform that monitors keyword and AI search visibility for SEO teams, consultants, and agencies.
- [Acronis Cyber Protect](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/acronis-cyber-protect/): Backup and cybersecurity platform combining data backup, anti-malware/ransomware protection, and endpoint management in one agent.
- [ActiveCampaign](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/activecampaign/): A marketing automation platform combining email, CRM, and WhatsApp messaging with AI-driven automation across customer engagement channels.
- [activepieces](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/activepieces/): Activepieces is the best way to build a self-driven AI culture across HR, finance, marketing, sales and more — under the supervision of your IT ninjas
- [Acuity Scheduling](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/acuity-scheduling/): Online appointment scheduling software for booking, payments, and calendar management, now owned by Squarespace.
- [Adalo](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/adalo/): No-code platform for building native mobile and web apps using a drag-and-drop visual editor with a built-in database.
- [AdEspresso](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/adespresso/): AdEspresso is a web-based tool for creating, split-testing, and optimizing Facebook, Instagram, and Google ad campaigns, owned by Hootsuite.
- [Adobe Acrobat](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/acrobat/): PDF creation, editing, and e-signature software, the tool that created and still defines the PDF format's editing ecosystem.
- [Adobe Express](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/adobe-express/): Browser and mobile app for quick social graphics, flyers, and short videos using templates and Adobe's Firefly AI tools.
- [Adobe Firefly](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/adobe-firefly/): Adobe's family of generative AI models for image, vector, and design creation, built into Creative Cloud and available as a standalone web app.
- [Adobe Illustrator](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/adobe-illustrator/): Industry-standard vector graphics software for creating logos, icons, illustrations, and print or digital artwork with precise, scalable paths.
- [Adobe Photoshop](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/photoshop/): The industry-standard image editing software for photo retouching, compositing, and digital painting, available standalone or via Creative Cloud.
- [ADP Workforce Now](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/adp-workforce-now/): All-in-one cloud HCM platform from ADP combining payroll, HR, benefits, time tracking, and talent management for mid-sized employers.
- [Advanced Web Ranking](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/advanced-web-ranking/): Advanced Web Ranking is SEO rank tracking software that monitors keyword rankings across Google, Bing, YouTube, and Amazon with automated reporting.
- [AdvancedMD](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/advancedmd/): Cloud-based practice management, EHR, and medical billing software for independent healthcare practices and billing companies.
- [Adyen](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/adyen/): Adyen is a global payments platform giving enterprises a single integration for online, in-store, and platform payments worldwide.
- [Agile CRM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/agile-crm/): All-in-one CRM combining sales, marketing, and customer support automation for small and mid-sized businesses.
- [Agorapulse](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/agorapulse/): Agorapulse is a social media management platform for scheduling, engagement, listening, and ROI reporting across major networks.
- [Ahrefs](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ahrefs/): An SEO toolset for keyword research, backlink analysis, competitor research, and site audits, built around one of the industry's largest backlink indexes.
- [Aikido Security](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/aikido-security/): Unified application security platform covering code, cloud, and runtime scanning plus AI-powered pentesting from one dashboard.
- [Airbyte](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/airbyte/): Airbyte is an open-source data integration (ELT) platform that syncs data from hundreds of sources into warehouses, lakes, and databases.
- [Aircall](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/aircall/): Aircall is a cloud-based business phone system that connects with CRMs and helpdesks to power sales and support call teams.
- [airflow](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/airflow/): Platform created by the community to programmatically author, schedule and monitor workflows.
- [Airtable](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/airtable/): An app-building platform combining a spreadsheet-like database with automations, interfaces, and AI to help teams build custom internal tools.
- [Airwallex](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/airwallex/): Airwallex is a global financial platform for multi-currency accounts, international transfers, corporate cards, and spend management.
- [Aiven](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/aiven/): Aiven is a multi-cloud managed platform for open-source data infrastructure, including Kafka, PostgreSQL, MySQL, and OpenSearch.
- [Akiflow](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/akiflow/): Akiflow is a digital planner that centralizes tasks and calendars into one time-blocked schedule, with an AI assistant called Aki for scheduling and prioritization.
- [Albato](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/albato/): Embedded iPaaS and automation platform offering 1,000+ app connectors, white-label integrations, and AI agents.
- [Alchemer](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/alchemer/): Alchemer is an enterprise survey and feedback platform for building advanced surveys, automating workflows, and turning open-text responses into actionable insights.
- [alf](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/alf/)
- [Algolia](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/algolia/): AI-powered search and retrieval platform offering neural search, personalization, and RAG tools for sites and apps.
- [All in One SEO](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/all-in-one-seo/): All in One SEO (AIOSEO) is a WordPress plugin offering on-page optimization, automated technical SEO, and an AI content assistant.
- [Alteryx](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/alteryx/): Alteryx is a self-service data analytics platform for drag-and-drop data prep, blending, and automated analytics.
- [AmazingHiring](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/amazinghiring/): AmazingHiring is a talent sourcing platform that searches 50+ networks like GitHub and Stack Overflow to find tech candidates.
- [Amazon Q Developer](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/amazon-q-developer/): AWS's generative AI coding assistant that offers code suggestions, chat, security scanning, and automated code upgrades across popular IDEs.
- [Amazon Redshift](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/amazon-redshift/): Amazon Redshift is AWS's fully managed, petabyte-scale cloud data warehouse for fast SQL analytics on structured and semi-structured data.
- [Amazon S3](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/amazon-s3/): Amazon S3 is AWS's foundational object storage service for storing and retrieving any amount of data with high durability and scalability.
- [Amie](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/amie/): Amie is an AI meeting-notes and calendar app that records and transcribes calls without a bot participant and turns action items into tasks.
- [Amplemarket](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/amplemarket/): AI sales platform that finds prospects via buying signals and automates personalized outreach across email, phone, and social.
- [Amplitude](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/amplitude/): A product analytics platform with AI-powered customer behavior insights, session replay, experimentation, and feature management.
- [Anyword](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/anyword/): AI copywriting platform that generates and predicts the performance of marketing copy for ads, email, and websites.
- [Apache Druid](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/druid/): Apache Druid is a free, open-source (Apache-2.0), distributed, column-oriented real-time analytics database that separates storage and compute, ingests via Apache Kafka (streaming) or HDFS/cloud…
- [Apollo.io](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/apollo-io/): Apollo.io is a sales intelligence platform combining B2B contact data, multichannel outreach automation, and deal execution tools.
- [Appcues](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/appcues/): Appcues is an in-app engagement platform for building onboarding tours, checklists, surveys, and messages to drive feature adoption.
- [Appointlet](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/appointlet/): Appointlet is online meeting scheduling software with shareable booking links, calendar sync, and automated reminders.
- [AppSheet](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/appsheet/): Google's no-code platform for building mobile and web apps from Google Sheets, Excel, and other data sources.
- [AppSignal](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/appsignal/): AppSignal is an all-in-one APM combining error tracking, performance monitoring, logs, uptime and host monitoring for Ruby, Elixir, Node.js and Python apps.
- [Appsmith](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/appsmith/): Open-source low-code platform for building internal tools, admin panels, and dashboards fast.
- [Apptivo](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/apptivo/): Apptivo is a cloud-based CRM and business management suite bundling sales, invoicing, projects, and helpdesk apps for small and mid-sized businesses.
- [Appwrite](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/appwrite/): Appwrite is an open-source backend platform providing auth, databases, storage, functions, messaging, and realtime in one package.
- [Aptabase](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/aptabase/): Aptabase is an open-source (AGPL-3.0), privacy-first analytics platform for mobile, desktop, and web apps, self-hostable via Docker, with official SDKs for Electron, Tauri, iOS, Android, Flutter,…
- [Apty](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/apty/): Apty is an AI-powered digital adoption platform adding in-app guidance, walkthroughs, and workflow analytics to apps like Salesforce and Workday.
- [Archbee](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/archbee/): Archbee is a documentation platform for building searchable knowledge portals, API docs, and product documentation with AI-assisted writing.
- [archivebox](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/archivebox/): ArchiveBox is open-source self-hosted web archiving for preserving websites, bookmarks, RSS feeds, social posts, media, evidence, research sources, and institutional records in durable HTML, PDF,…
- [archivesspace](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/archivesspace/)
- [Around](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/around/): Around was a floating-bubble video calling app that cut meeting fatigue for remote teams; Miro acquired it in 2022 and sunset it in 2025.
- [Artboard Studio](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/artboard-studio/): Browser-based mockup generator that applies images or videos to realistic device, apparel, and packaging mockups.
- [Asana](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/asana/): A work management platform for organizing, tracking, and collaborating on projects with unlimited tasks, list/board/timeline/calendar views, and AI Studio.
- [Ashby](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ashby/): Ashby is an all-in-one ATS combining applicant tracking, sourcing, scheduling, and analytics for high-growth tech companies.
- [Astra Security](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/astra-security/): AI-powered continuous penetration testing platform combining PTaaS, DAST, API security, and cloud vulnerability scanning.
- [athenaOne](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/athenaone/): Cloud-based EHR, practice management, and revenue cycle management platform that streamlines clinical, billing, and patient engagement workflows.
- [Attio](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/attio/): Attio is an AI-native CRM that lets revenue teams manage pipeline, automate outreach sequences, and analyze calls, with native AI search and workflows.
- [Auphonic](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/auphonic/): Auphonic is a web-based AI audio post-production service that automatically levels, cleans, and normalizes podcast and video audio.
- [Auth0](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/auth0/): Auth0 is a cloud identity platform that adds login, SSO, and MFA to apps via APIs and SDKs, now part of Okta.
- [Autodesk Construction Cloud](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/autodesk-construction-cloud/): Autodesk's unified construction management platform connecting design, preconstruction, and field teams through one common data environment.
- [automatisch](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/automatisch/): An open-source, self-hostable workflow automation platform — an alternative to closed SaaS tools like Zapier.
- [Avast](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/avast/): Avast is a Czech-founded cybersecurity brand offering free and paid antivirus, VPN, and PC optimization tools for consumers.
- [AvidXchange](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/avidxchange/): AvidXchange automates accounts payable — invoice capture, coding, approvals, and payments — for mid-market industries like real estate and construction.
- [Awario](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/awario/): Web and social monitoring tool that tracks brand mentions across 13B+ pages daily with sentiment analysis and Boolean search.
- [AWeber](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/aweber/): AWeber is a veteran email marketing platform offering automation, landing pages, and AI tools built for small businesses and solo creators.
- [AWS](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/aws/): AWS is Amazon's cloud computing platform, offering 200+ on-demand services for compute, storage, databases, networking, and AI/ML at global scale.
- [Axiom](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/axiom/): Axiom is a fully managed, schema-less log and event data platform built for petabyte-scale observability with usage-based pricing.
- [Backblaze](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/backblaze/): Backblaze offers unlimited personal cloud backup and low-cost, S3-compatible B2 object storage for developers and businesses.
- [BambooHR](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/bamboohr/): Cloud HR platform for small and midsize businesses, combining HRIS, hiring, time off, and performance tools in one system.
- [Bardeen](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/bardeen/): AI-powered automation tool for go-to-market teams that scrapes, researches, qualifies, and enriches leads.
- [Baremetrics](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/baremetrics/): Baremetrics is subscription analytics software that tracks MRR, churn, and forecasting, and automates failed-payment recovery for SaaS businesses.
- [Basecamp](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/basecamp/): A project management platform with message boards, to-dos, Kanban-style card tables, chat, and scheduling built into every plan.
- [Beehiiv](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/beehiiv/): All-in-one newsletter platform for writing, growing, and monetizing email publications, built by former Morning Brew engineers.
- [Benchmark Email](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/benchmark-email/): Email marketing platform with a drag-and-drop builder, contact management, and a free plan for up to 500 contacts.
- [Better Proposals](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/better-proposals/): Better Proposals is web-based proposal and e-signature software for creating, sending, tracking, and getting paid on client proposals.
- [Better Stack](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/better-stack/): Better Stack is an observability platform providing logs, metrics, tracing, uptime monitoring, and AI-assisted incident management.
- [BigCommerce](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/bigcommerce/): BigCommerce is an open SaaS ecommerce platform built for scaling mid-market and B2B retailers with strong built-in and headless commerce tools.
- [BigQuery](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/bigquery/): Google's fully-managed, serverless data warehouse for fast SQL analytics and machine learning at petabyte scale.
- [Bill.com](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/bill-com/): Bill.com automates accounts payable and receivable, invoicing, and payments for small and midsize businesses and accounting firms.
- [Billsby](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/billsby/): Billsby is subscription billing software for managing recurring payments, dunning, tax compliance, and revenue reporting.
- [Bitdefender](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/bitdefender/): Romanian cybersecurity company offering award-winning antivirus, internet security, and endpoint protection for consumers and businesses.
- [bitmagnet](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/bitmagnet/): A self-hosted BitTorrent indexer, DHT crawler, content classifier and torrent search engine with web UI, GraphQL API and Servarr stack integration.
- [Bitwarden](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/bitwarden/): Open-source password manager with a genuinely free tier, end-to-end encryption, and optional self-hosting for individuals, families, and businesses.
- [Blackboard Learn](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/blackboard-learn/): Enterprise learning management system used by colleges and universities to deliver, manage, and grade online and blended courses.
- [Bolt.new](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/bolt-new/): Bolt.new is StackBlitz's AI app builder that turns natural-language prompts into full-stack web apps you can edit and deploy from your browser.
- [Botify](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/botify/): Botify is an enterprise AI search optimization platform helping large sites improve visibility across search engines and AI agents.
- [Braintree](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/braintree/): Braintree, a PayPal company, is an enterprise payment processing platform for cards, PayPal, Venmo, and digital wallets with fraud protection.
- [Brand24](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/brand24/): AI-powered social listening tool that tracks brand mentions and sentiment across 25M+ online sources in real time.
- [Brandwatch](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/brandwatch/): Enterprise social listening and consumer intelligence platform for brand monitoring, sentiment analysis, and competitive benchmarking.
- [Bravo Studio](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/bravo-studio/): Bravo Studio turns Figma design files into real native iOS and Android apps using an AI-driven build engine, no code required.
- [Braze](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/braze/): A customer engagement platform unifying customer data across channels for AI-powered, personalized messaging orchestration at scale.
- [Breakcold](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/breakcold/): AI-native CRM that unifies LinkedIn, email, WhatsApp, Telegram, and Instagram conversations into one sales pipeline.
- [BreatheHR](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/breathehr/): Breathe (BreatheHR) is an HR platform for UK SMEs covering absence, leave, onboarding, performance management and e-learning.
- [Breezy HR](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/breezy-hr/): Breezy HR is a visual, easy-to-use applicant tracking system with drag-and-drop pipelines built for small and mid-sized hiring teams.
- [Brevo](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/brevo/): Brevo (formerly Sendinblue) is an all-in-one marketing platform for email, SMS, chat, and CRM built for growing businesses.
- [Brex](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/brex/): Brex is a US fintech offering corporate charge cards with no personal guarantee, paired with an expense, bill pay, and travel management platform.
- [Bubble](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/bubble/): Bubble is a visual no-code platform for building and hosting full web applications with a database, logic, and frontend—no coding required.
- [Buffer](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/buffer/): A social media management platform for planning, scheduling, and analyzing content, priced per connected channel rather than a flat team subscription.
- [Bugsnag](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/bugsnag/): BugSnag, part of SmartBear, is an application stability monitoring platform for detecting, prioritizing, and resolving errors and performance issues.
- [Buildertrend](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/buildertrend/): Cloud-based construction project management software for home builders and remodelers to schedule jobs, manage budgets, and communicate with clients.
- [Bullhorn](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/bullhorn/): Bullhorn is a cloud ATS and CRM for staffing and recruitment agencies, used by 80% of the world's largest staffing firms.
- [ButterCMS](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/buttercms/): An API-first headless CMS with a free plan, official framework SDKs, and built-in SEO and AI content-assist tools.
- [Cabin](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/cabin/): Cabin is a privacy-first, cookie-free web analytics tool built with a lightweight script and carbon reporting.
- [cal](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/cal/): Cal.diy self-hosting documentation
- [Cal.com](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/cal-com/): Cal.com is an open-source scheduling platform with calendar sync, built-in video calls, and Stripe-enabled bookings.
- [Calday](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/calday/): Calday is online booking software for solo service providers and small businesses, with a booking page, calendar sync, and payments.
- [Calendly](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/calendly/): A scheduling automation platform with customizable event types, calendar integrations, payment collection, and CRM connections to streamline meeting booking.
- [Campaign Monitor](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/campaign-monitor/): Design-forward email marketing platform with a drag-and-drop builder, automation, and segmentation for growing businesses.
- [Camtasia](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/camtasia/): Camtasia is screen recording and video editing software for Windows and Mac with AI script, voice, and avatar generation tools.
- [Canva](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/canva/): The all-in-one design platform for creating social posts, presentations, videos, and printed materials — no design experience required.
- [Canvas LMS](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/canvas-lms/): Canvas LMS is Instructure's cloud-based learning management system used by schools, universities, and districts to deliver courses, grades, and content.
- [Capsule CRM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/capsule-crm/): Capsule CRM is contact and sales pipeline management software with project tracking, workflow automation, and AI-assisted features for small and mid-sized businesses.
- [Captions](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/captions/): Captions is an AI video editor that auto-edits raw footage, adds stylized captions, and generates AI-avatar 'digital twin' videos.
- [Carbonite](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/carbonite/): Carbonite is a cloud backup service that automatically and continuously protects computers, servers, and Microsoft 365 data from loss.
- [Carrd](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/carrd/): Carrd is a lightweight, low-cost builder for simple, fully responsive one-page websites, landing pages, and link-in-bio sites.
- [castopod](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/castopod/): Castopod is a free and open-source hosting platform made for podcasters. Engage and interact with your audience whilst keeping control over your content.
- [Celoxis](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/celoxis/): Celoxis is an enterprise project portfolio management platform combining Gantt scheduling, resource management, budgeting, and BI reporting.
- [Chameleon](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/chameleon/): Chameleon is an in-app guidance platform combining behavior tracking, product tours, and AI-built experiences to reduce friction and drive adoption.
- [changedetection](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/changedetection/): A website change detection and monitoring tool with a documented REST API for programmatic integration.
- [Chanty](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/chanty/): Chanty is an affordable, easy-to-use team chat app with a built-in Kanban task board, positioned as a simpler alternative to Slack.
- [Chaport](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/chaport/): Customer messaging platform combining live chat, AI chatbots, and multichannel support across email, Facebook, Telegram, and Viber.
- [Chargebee](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/chargebee/): Subscription billing and revenue management platform that automates recurring invoicing, payments, and revenue recognition for SaaS companies.
- [CharlieHR](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/charliehr/): CharlieHR is an HR platform that automates onboarding, time off, performance reviews and employee records for small UK businesses.
- [ChartMogul](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/chartmogul/): ChartMogul is subscription analytics software that consolidates MRR, churn, and forecasting data from multiple billing systems into one dashboard.
- [ChatGPT](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/chatgpt/): ChatGPT is OpenAI's conversational AI assistant for writing, coding, research, and everyday tasks via chat, voice, and image input.
- [Chatsonic](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/chatsonic/): Chatsonic is Writesonic's AI chatbot that blends GPT-4o, Claude, and Gemini with real-time web search and image generation.
- [Chatwoot](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/chatwoot/): Chatwoot is an open-source customer support platform unifying live chat, WhatsApp, email, and social channels with an AI agent and copilot.
- [Checkly](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/checkly/): Checkly is a monitoring-as-code platform for API, browser, and uptime checks, deployable via CLI, Terraform, or Pulumi.
- [Checkout.com](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/checkout-com/): Checkout.com is a global enterprise payment processor for online payment acceptance, money movement, fraud protection, and payment optimization.

- [chyrplite](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/chyrplite/): Chyrp Lite is an ultra-lightweight blogging engine, written in PHP.
- [ckan](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ckan/): CKAN is an open-source DMS (data management system) for powering data hubs and data portals. CKAN makes it easy to publish, share and use data.
- [Claude](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/claude/): Claude is Anthropic's AI assistant for conversation, writing, coding, and document/image analysis via web, desktop, and mobile apps.
- [Clay](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/clay/): Go-to-market data platform combining waterfall enrichment from 200+ providers with AI research agents (Claygents).
- [CleanShot X](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/cleanshot-x/): CleanShot X is a macOS screenshot and screen recording app with scrolling capture, annotation tools, OCR, and cloud sharing.
- [Cleanvoice](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/cleanvoice/): Cleanvoice is an AI audio/video editor that automatically removes filler words, background noise, mouth sounds, and silences from podcast recordings.
- [Clearscope](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/clearscope/): Clearscope is an SEO content optimization platform that grades content against top-ranking pages to improve search performance.
- [Clever Cloud](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/clever-cloud/): Clever Cloud is a French sovereign PaaS for deploying and operating applications and managed databases with per-second, pay-as-you-go billing.
- [ClickFunnels](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/clickfunnels/): A sales funnel and marketing platform for building landing pages, email campaigns, courses, and ecommerce stores to convert visitors into customers.

- [Framer](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/framer/): Framer is a no-code website builder with a visual design canvas, AI site generation, a built-in CMS, and one-click hosting for teams and creators.
- [Frase](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/frase/): AI content platform that builds SEO briefs, scores drafts against top-ranking pages, and tracks citation visibility in AI search engines.
- [Freedcamp](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/freedcamp/): Freedcamp is a project management platform with a genuinely free plan for unlimited users and tasks, plus paid add-ons for Gantt, invoicing, and CRM.
- [FreshBooks](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/freshbooks/): Online accounting and invoicing software for freelancers and small businesses, covering invoicing, expenses, time tracking, and payments.
- [Freshdesk](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/freshdesk/): AI-boosted customer service ticketing software with shared inboxes, customer portals, and Freddy AI Agent for automated support.
- [Freshsales](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/freshsales/): Freshsales is Freshworks' sales CRM with built-in phone, email, and Freddy AI-driven lead scoring for growing sales teams.
- [Front](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/front/): An AI customer operations platform unifying shared inboxes, ticketing, and automation across channels, with AI Copilot and Smart QA on higher tiers.
- [FullStory](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/fullstory/): FullStory is a digital experience analytics platform combining session replay, product analytics and AI-driven behavioral insights for web and mobile.
- [Gainsight](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gainsight/): Customer success platform for B2B SaaS: health scores, playbooks, and journey orchestration to reduce churn and drive expansion.
- [Gem](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gem/): Gem is an AI-first recruiting platform that unifies sourcing, CRM, ATS, scheduling, and analytics for talent acquisition teams.
- [General Translation](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/general-translation/): General Translation is a localization/i18n platform with a GitHub-connected translation workflow, UI/number/currency localization components, and 'Context Groups' for managing translation context,…
- [getleon](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/getleon/): Leon is an open-source personal assistant who can live on your server. He is built on the top of Node.js, Python and artificial intelligence concepts.
- [GetResponse](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/getresponse/): All-in-one email marketing and automation platform with landing pages, webinars, and AI tools, plus a free plan for small contact lists.
- [ghost](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ghost/): Beautiful, modern publishing with email newsletters and paid subscriptions built-in. Used by Platformer, 404Media, Lever News, Tangle, The Browser, and thousands more.
- [GitGuardian](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gitguardian/): Secrets detection and non-human identity governance platform that finds and remediates exposed credentials in code and CI/CD.
- [GitHub](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/github/): A web-based Git platform for version control, code review, and collaborative software development, with built-in CI/CD via GitHub Actions.
- [GitHub Copilot](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/github-copilot/): AI pair programmer from GitHub and OpenAI that suggests code, chats about your codebase, and can autonomously open pull requests.
- [Gladly](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gladly/): Customer experience AI platform that unifies support conversations across channels around a single customer timeline.
- [Glean](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/glean/): Glean is an enterprise Work AI platform that unifies company data and apps to power permission-aware search, AI agents, and automation.
- [Glide](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/glide/): No-code platform that turns spreadsheets, Airtable, or databases into mobile and web apps, with AI-assisted app generation.
- [goatcounter](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/goatcounter/): A privacy-focused, GDPR-conscious website analytics tool with publicly-handled support via GitHub issues.
- [GoCardless](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gocardless/): GoCardless automates recurring payment collection via SEPA, UK Direct Debit, and Autogiro, with pay-as-you-go pricing and 350+ integrations.
- [GoDaddy Website Builder](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/godaddy-website-builder/): GoDaddy Website Builder is an AI-assisted, no-code site builder that helps small businesses launch a website, blog, or online store in minutes.
- [Google Analytics](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/google-analytics/): Google Analytics (GA4) is Google's free, event-based platform for tracking website and app user behavior, conversions, and marketing performance.
- [Google Classroom](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/google-classroom/): Free Google tool for creating classes, distributing assignments, grading work, and messaging students and parents from one connected hub.
- [Google Cloud](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/google-cloud/): Google Cloud is Google's public cloud platform for compute, storage, data analytics, and AI, built on the infrastructure behind Search and YouTube.
- [Google Cloud Storage](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/google-cloud-storage/): Google's object storage service for storing and retrieving any amount of data, with tiered classes for hot, cool, and archival access.
- [Google Drive](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/google-drive/): Google Drive is Google's cloud storage and file sync service, integrated with Docs, Sheets, and Slides, offering 15GB free and paid upgrades.
- [Google Forms](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/google-forms/): Google Forms is Google's free tool for building online forms, surveys, and quizzes, with responses collected automatically into Google Sheets.
- [Google Gemini](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/google-gemini/): Google's multimodal AI chat assistant and model family, built into Search, Workspace, Android, and available to developers via API.
- [Google Workspace](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/google-workspace/): A cloud productivity suite combining Gmail, Docs, Drive, Meet, and Calendar for business email, collaboration, and storage.
- [Gorgias](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gorgias/): Ecommerce helpdesk with native Shopify order data, live chat, and an AI Agent that answers and resolves support tickets automatically.
- [GoTo Meeting](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/goto-meeting/): GoTo Meeting is a longstanding video conferencing platform with HD video, screen sharing, cloud recording, and AI meeting transcription.
- [GPTZero](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gptzero/): AI writing detector that scores text for AI-generated content, flags mixed authorship, and checks for plagiarism.
- [gql.tada](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gql-tada/): Magical GraphQL query engine for TypeScript
- [Grafana](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/grafana/): Grafana is an open-source platform for visualizing and alerting on metrics, logs, and traces from Prometheus, Loki, and 100+ other data sources.
- [Grammarly](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/grammarly/): An AI-powered writing assistant offering grammar checking, tone adjustment, plagiarism detection, and AI-generated text across desktop, browser, and mobile.
- [Greenhouse](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/greenhouse/): Greenhouse is an enterprise applicant tracking and hiring platform for structured, AI-assisted recruiting, sourcing, and onboarding.
- [Grok](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/grok/): Grok is xAI's conversational AI chatbot offering real-time X integration, reasoning, coding help, and image/video generation via web, app, and API.
- [GrowthBar](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/growthbar/): GrowthBar is an AI SEO writing tool for keyword research, SERP-based content outlines, and competitor backlink/ad analysis, now operated by SEOptimer.
- [GrowthBook](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/growthbook/): GrowthBook is a warehouse-native platform for running A/B tests, managing feature flags, and product analytics.
- [Gumroad](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gumroad/): Gumroad lets creators sell digital products, courses, memberships, and commissions directly to fans with a simple pay-per-sale fee.
- [Guru](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/guru/): Guru is an AI-powered enterprise knowledge management platform that structures, verifies, and delivers governed answers to people and AI tools.
- [Gusto](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/gusto/): Cloud-based payroll, benefits, and HR platform that helps small and medium U.S. businesses pay teams and stay compliant.
- [HappyFox](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/happyfox/): HappyFox is cloud-based help desk and customer support ticketing software with automation, a knowledge base, and multi-channel support.
- [Harvest](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/harvest/): A time tracking and invoicing platform for monitoring hours, generating invoices, and analyzing project profitability, with Asana and Slack integrations.
- [Hasura](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hasura/): Hasura provides an instant GraphQL API layer over databases, plus PromptQL, an AI product for querying business data accurately.
- [havenweb](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/havenweb/)
- [healthchecks](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/healthchecks/): Get instant alerts when your cron jobs, background workers, scheduled tasks don't run on time. Monitor up to 20 cron jobs for free.
- [Heap](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/heap/): Digital analytics platform that autocaptures every user interaction so teams can retroactively analyze behavior without pre-instrumenting events.
- [Height](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/height/): Height was an AI-driven project management and issue-tracking tool for product teams; the service was discontinued in September 2025.
- [Help Scout](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/help-scout/): A customer support platform with a shared inbox, live chat, knowledge base (Docs), and a pay-per-resolution AI Answers add-on.

- [Helpjuice](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/helpjuice/): Helpjuice is a knowledge base platform with AI-powered writing, search, and a chatbot for internal and customer-facing documentation.
- [Heroku](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/heroku/): Heroku is a cloud platform-as-a-service owned by Salesforce that lets developers deploy, manage, and scale apps via git push, dynos, and buildpacks.
- [Hetzner](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hetzner/): Hetzner Online is a German hosting provider offering dedicated servers, cloud servers, storage, and web hosting at competitive prices.
- [Heyflow](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/heyflow/): Heyflow is a no-code funnel and interactive form builder for lead generation, with native ad tracking, payments, and appointment booking built into the flow.
- [HeyGen](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/heygen/): AI video generation platform that turns text into lifelike avatar videos with voice cloning, dubbing, and translation.
- [hi](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hi/): Event ticketing with the lowest fees in the industry. Instant payouts, custom branding, full data ownership. Use our cloud or self-host for free. The Eventbrite alternative.

- [Hostinger](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/hostinger/): Hostinger is a web hosting and website-building platform offering shared, cloud, and VPS hosting plus an AI website builder called Horizons.

- [Ideogram](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ideogram/): AI image generator best known for producing legible, accurate text inside images, with style presets, editing tools, and an API.
- [IDrive](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/idrive/): Cloud backup service for PCs, Macs, mobile devices, NAS, and servers, with unlimited devices per plan and low per-TB pricing.
- [IFTTT](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ifttt/): No-code automation platform that connects apps, devices, and services with simple trigger-action "applets".
- [iLovePDF](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ilovepdf/): Web-based PDF toolkit for merging, splitting, compressing, converting, editing, and e-signing PDF files, with mobile apps and a developer API.
- [Infisical](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/infisical/): Open-source platform for managing application secrets, PKI certificates, and privileged access across cloud and AI infrastructure.
- [InfluxDB Cloud](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/influxdb-cloud/): InfluxDB Cloud is a managed time-series database for ingesting, storing, and analyzing high-velocity operational and sensor data in real time.
- [Insightly](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/insightly/): Cloud CRM combining sales pipelines, native project delivery, and marketing automation for small and mid-sized B2B teams.
- [Instantly](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/instantly/): Instantly is a sales engagement platform for cold email outreach, a large lead database, and AI agents that automate prospecting and replies.
- [Instapage](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/instapage/): A landing page builder focused on turning ad clicks into customers with personalized pages, AI content generation, and conversion analytics.
- [Instatus](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/instatus/): Instatus lets teams monitor services, manage incidents, and publish branded public or private status pages for customers.
- [Integrately](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/integrately/): No-code automation platform offering 20M+ pre-built, one-click automations across 1,500+ apps.
- [IntelliCode](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/intellicode-vscode/): An AI-assisted IntelliSense extension for VS Code that predicts whole-line code completions and surfaces real-world API usage examples for Python, TypeScript/JavaScript, and Java.
- [Interakt](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/interakt/): Interakt is a WhatsApp, Instagram, and RCS customer engagement platform with a no-code chatbot builder, CRM, and AI agents.

- [involve.me](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/involve-me/): involve.me builds interactive quizzes, forms, calculators, and surveys that score leads and trigger automated email sequences.

- [Jenni AI](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/jenni-ai/): AI academic writing assistant that autocompletes text and links every claim to a traceable source citation.

- [Jimdo](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/jimdo/): A German website and online store builder offering both a simple no-code editor and a code-customizable Creator editor.
- [Jira](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/jira/): Atlassian's issue tracking and agile project management tool for software teams, supporting Scrum and Kanban workflows with deep developer-tool integrations.

- [Kling AI](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/kling-ai/): Kuaishou's Kling AI turns text or images into high-resolution AI video with native audio, lip-sync, and up to 4K, multi-shot narrative clips.

- [Krisp](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/krisp/): Krisp is an AI app that cancels background noise and echo on any calling app and generates meeting transcripts, summaries, and notes.

- [Lattice](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/lattice/): Lattice is a people management platform for performance reviews, goals/OKRs, engagement surveys, and career development.

- [Lavender](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/lavender/): AI email coaching platform that scores and rewrites sales emails to improve reply rates.
- [Lawmatics](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/lawmatics/): Legal CRM and intake automation platform that helps law firms capture leads, automate follow-up, and sign clients faster.
- [LeadIQ](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/leadiq/): LeadIQ is a B2B prospecting platform that captures, enriches, and syncs sales leads to CRMs with browser tools and AI-driven account targeting.
- [Leadpages](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/leadpages/): No-code landing page and lead generation builder with pop-ups, templates, and A/B testing for small businesses and marketers.
- [LearnDash](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/learndash/): LearnDash is a leading WordPress LMS plugin for building, selling, and managing online courses, quizzes, and certifications.
- [Lemlist](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/lemlist/): lemlist is a multichannel outbound platform with a 650M+ lead database and AI-assisted email, LinkedIn, call, WhatsApp, and SMS outreach.
- [Lemon Squeezy](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/lemon-squeezy/): Lemon Squeezy is a merchant-of-record platform, now owned by Stripe, handling payments, tax compliance, and subscriptions for software sellers.
- [Leonardo AI](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/leonardo-ai/): AI image generation platform with fine-tuned models, real-time canvas editing, and production-grade tools for games, marketing, and design.
- [Less Annoying CRM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/less-annoying-crm/): A simple, flat-fee CRM built for small businesses, offering contact management, pipelines, and lead tracking without complexity.
- [Letterdrop](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/letterdrop/): A competitor-monitoring and pipeline-intelligence platform that surfaces named contacts in active sales cycles with your competitors.
- [LettuceMeet](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/lettucemeet/): LettuceMeet is a free group scheduling tool where participants overlay their availability on a shared grid to find the best meeting time.
- [Lever](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/lever/): Lever (LeverTRM) is an enterprise applicant tracking system with built-in CRM for sourcing, interviewing, and hiring at scale.
- [librebooking](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/librebooking/)
- [Lightspeed Retail](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/lightspeed-retail/): Cloud-based POS and retail management platform handling inventory, payments, eCommerce, and reporting for single and multi-location stores.
- [Lindy](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/lindy/): Lindy is an AI work assistant that manages email, scheduling, meeting notes, and CRM follow-ups across connected apps.
- [Linear](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/linear/): Linear is a fast, keyboard-driven issue tracker and project management tool built for software teams to plan and ship work.
- [LinkedIn Recruiter](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/linkedin-recruiter/): LinkedIn's enterprise sourcing platform for recruiters, offering advanced search, InMail, and pipeline tools across LinkedIn's member network.
- [LinkWhisper](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/linkwhisper/): LinkWhisper is a WordPress plugin that uses AI to suggest internal links, detect orphan pages, and (in its premium tier) automate bulk internal linking.
- [Linode](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/linode/): Linode, part of Akamai, is a cloud computing platform offering compute, Kubernetes, storage, managed databases, and networking with flat pricing.
- [Listnr](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/listnr/): Listnr is an AI text-to-speech platform with 1000+ voices across 142+ languages for voiceovers, podcasts, and video content.
- [Live Server](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/live-server-vscode/): Launch a development local Server by a single click and watch live changes with some extra functionality
- [LiveAgent](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/liveagent/): Omnichannel help desk with ticketing, live chat, an AI chatbot, and a built-in call center with IVR.
- [LiveChat](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/livechat/): LiveChat is a customer service and live chat platform that helps businesses engage website visitors, answer support tickets, and drive sales in real time.
- [Livestorm](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/livestorm/): Browser-based webinar and virtual event platform for marketing, sales, and customer engagement teams.
- [LogicGate](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/logicgate/): No-code GRC platform for building custom risk, compliance, vendor, and audit management workflows.
- [LogRocket](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/logrocket/): LogRocket is an AI-powered session replay, product analytics, and error tracking platform for diagnosing web and mobile UX issues.
- [LogSnag](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/logsnag/): LogSnag turns simple HTTP events into real-time dashboards, funnels, and instant push notifications for tracking product activity.
- [Lookback](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/lookback/): User research platform for running moderated and unmoderated usability tests, interviews, and native mobile app testing with AI-assisted analysis.
- [Looker](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/looker/): Enterprise business intelligence and data platform from Google Cloud, built on a governed LookML semantic modeling layer.
- [Looker Studio](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/looker-studio/): Free, web-based data visualization tool from Google that turns raw data into shareable, interactive dashboards and reports.
- [Loom](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/loom/): An async video messaging platform for recording and sharing screen recordings, with AI-powered auto-generated meeting notes and summaries.
- [Loomly](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/loomly/): Loomly is a social media management platform with a content calendar, post ideas, approval workflows, and analytics for teams and agencies.
- [Loops](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/loops/): Email platform for SaaS companies that unifies product, marketing, and transactional email sending with a contact-based pricing model.
- [Lovable](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/lovable/): AI app builder that turns natural-language prompts into full-stack, deployable web applications.
- [LOVO](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/lovo/): LOVO (Genny) is an AI text-to-speech and video editing platform offering 500+ voices, voice cloning, and auto-generated subtitles.
- [Luma AI](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/luma-ai/): AI creative platform for text-to-video and image-to-video generation, best known for Dream Machine and the Ray model family.
- [Lumar](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/lumar/): Lumar (formerly DeepCrawl) is an enterprise platform for technical SEO, AI search visibility, site speed, and accessibility audits.
- [Lunacy](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/lunacy/): Lunacy is a free graphic design app for Windows, Mac, and Linux with vector editing, offline use, and Sketch/Figma file import.
- [Lusha](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/lusha/): Lusha is a B2B sales intelligence platform providing verified contact and company data, buying signals, and prospecting tools for go-to-market teams.

- [Orca Security](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/orca-security/): Agentless cloud-native application protection platform (CNAPP) covering vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, and malware from code to runtime.
- [Originality.ai](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/originality-ai/): AI content detection and plagiarism checker for publishers, agencies, and SEO teams, with credit-based scanning and API access.
- [Ortto](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ortto/): Ortto combines marketing automation, a customer data platform, and support tools like live chat into one system for building customer journeys.
- [Outgrow](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/outgrow/): Outgrow is a no-code platform for building interactive quizzes, calculators, chatbots, and forms that qualify leads.
- [Outline](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/outline/): Outline is an open-source team wiki and knowledge base with real-time editing, AI question answering, and a self-hosted option.
- [Outplay](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/outplay/): Outplay is a sales engagement platform for growing SMBs with multichannel outreach, a dialer, and a free-forever plan for small teams.
- [OVHcloud](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/ovhcloud/): OVHcloud is a French cloud provider offering VPS, dedicated servers, public and private cloud, web hosting, and domain registration.
- [Oyster](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/oyster/): Oyster is an Employer of Record platform for hiring, paying and managing employees and contractors in 180+ countries without local entities.
- [Pabbly Connect](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/pabbly-connect/): No-code integration platform connecting 2,000+ apps into multi-step workflows, with triggers that don't consume task quota.
- [Paddle](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/paddle/): Paddle is a merchant-of-record platform that handles billing, global tax compliance, and payments for SaaS and software companies.
- [PagerDuty](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/pagerduty/): An incident response and on-call management platform for mission-critical operations, with escalation policies, workflows, and AI-assisted actions.
- [Pallyy](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/pallyy/): Social media scheduling tool with a content calendar, approval workflows, unified inbox, and link-in-bio pages.
- [PandaDoc](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/pandadoc/): A document automation platform for creating, signing, and managing proposals and contracts, with customizable templates for sales, HR, and legal teams.
- [Pantheon](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/pantheon/): Pantheon is a WebOps platform for building, hosting, and managing WordPress, Drupal, and Next.js sites with a Dev/Test/Live workflow.
- [Papaya Global](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/papaya-global/): Papaya Global is a workforce management platform offering Employer of Record, global payroll and contractor payments in 160+ countries.
- [Paperform](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/paperform/): Paperform is a no-code form and landing page builder that turns forms into document-style pages with payments, quizzes, and calculators.
- [Papertrail](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/papertrail/): Papertrail, by SolarWinds, is a cloud log management service for aggregating, searching and alerting on logs from servers and applications in real time.
- [Parabola](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/parabola/): AI agent platform that turns natural-language descriptions of ops/finance processes into automated, auditable workflows.
- [ParagraphAI](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/paragraphai/): ParagraphAI is an AI writing assistant that drafts, corrects, and translates text via a mobile keyboard, browser extension, and apps.
- [Pardot](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/pardot/): Salesforce's B2B marketing automation platform for lead scoring, email nurturing, and ROI reporting, now called Marketing Cloud Account Engagement.
- [Paychex Flex](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/paychex-flex/): Paychex Flex is a cloud payroll and HR platform for small and midsize businesses, covering payroll, tax filing, benefits, and HR compliance.
- [Payhawk](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/payhawk/): Payhawk is a spend management platform combining corporate cards, expenses, travel, accounts payable, and procurement with AI.
- [Payload CMS](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/payload-cms/): Open-source, code-first headless CMS and backend built specifically for Next.js, with an auto-generated admin panel.

- [Paymo](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/paymo/): Paymo is an all-in-one project management, time tracking, and invoicing platform built for freelancers and small teams.
- [Payoneer](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/payoneer/): Payoneer is a global payment platform for freelancers, businesses, and marketplaces to send and receive cross-border payments in 70 currencies.
- [PayPal](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/paypal/): Global online payment platform for sending money, checking out on websites, and accepting payments as a business.

- [ScoreApp](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/scoreapp/): ScoreApp is an AI-powered scorecard and quiz builder that qualifies leads with personalized results and follow-up emails.
- [Scoro](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/scoro/): End-to-end work management platform unifying projects, billing, CRM, and reporting for agencies and professional services firms.
- [Scout APM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/scout-apm/): Scout APM (Scout Monitoring) provides code-level performance traces, error monitoring and log management for Ruby, Python, PHP, Elixir and Node.js apps.
- [Screaming Frog](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/screaming-frog/): Desktop website crawler for technical SEO audits — finds broken links, redirects, duplicate content, and metadata issues at scale.
- [Screen Studio](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/screen-studio/): macOS screen recorder that automatically applies cursor-following zoom effects and smooths cursor movement for polished demo videos.
- [ScreenFlow](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/screenflow/): ScreenFlow is a Mac-only app for recording your screen, camera, and microphone, then editing the footage into finished videos.
- [Scrut Automation](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/scrut-automation/): GRC automation platform with AI agents that continuously monitor controls, validate evidence, and manage vendor risk across 60+ frameworks.
- [SE Ranking](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/se-ranking/): All-in-one SEO platform for rank tracking, keyword research, site audits, backlink monitoring, and competitor analysis.
- [Seamless.AI](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/seamless-ai/): Seamless.AI is a real-time search engine that helps B2B sales teams find verified emails, phone numbers, and buying-intent data for prospecting.
- [seatsurfing](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/seatsurfing/): Desk sharing, room reservation, free seating, and co-working for enterprises.
- [Segment](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/segment/): A customer data platform (now part of Twilio) for collecting, unifying, and routing customer event data to 700+ destination apps.
- [Sejda PDF](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sejda-pdf/): Web-based and desktop PDF editor for merging, splitting, editing, signing, converting, and compressing PDF files.
- [Sellfy](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sellfy/): Sellfy is an e-commerce platform for creators to sell digital products, subscriptions, and print-on-demand merch with built-in marketing tools.
- [Sematext](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sematext/): Sematext is a pay-as-you-go observability platform offering logs, infrastructure monitoring, tracing, and synthetic monitoring.
- [Semgrep](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/semgrep/): Static analysis security platform combining SAST, software composition analysis, and secrets detection with AI-assisted triage.
- [Semrush](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/semrush/): A digital marketing platform combining SEO tools, competitive intelligence, and AI search visibility tracking for keyword research, site audits, and rank tracking.
- [Sender](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sender/): Email marketing platform with drag-and-drop campaigns, automation, and a free-forever plan for up to 2,500 subscribers.
- [SendGrid](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sendgrid/): Twilio-owned email delivery platform offering an Email API/SMTP service for developers and Marketing Campaigns for marketers.
- [Sendible](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sendible/): Sendible is a social media management platform for agencies and marketing teams to schedule, collaborate, monitor, and report across networks.
- [SendPulse](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sendpulse/): Multi-channel marketing platform combining email, SMS, chatbots, and a CRM, with a free tier for small volumes.
- [SentinelOne](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sentinelone/): AI-driven endpoint, cloud, and identity security platform unifying EDR, XDR, and autonomous threat response for enterprises.
- [Sentry](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sentry/): An error monitoring and application observability platform for identifying and fixing bugs, with performance tracing, session replay, and AI debugging.
- [Seobility](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/seobility/): Seobility is an all-in-one SEO suite for website audits, rank tracking, backlink analysis, and competitor research.
- [Serpstat](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/serpstat/): All-in-one SEO platform for keyword research, rank tracking, backlink analysis, site audits, and PPC competitor research.
- [ServiceNow](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/servicenow/): Enterprise cloud platform that automates IT service management, IT operations, HR, and customer service workflows with AI.
- [ServiceTitan](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/servicetitan/): Field service management software for HVAC, plumbing, and electrical trades, covering scheduling, dispatch, invoicing, and marketing.
- [Setmore](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/setmore/): Setmore is an online appointment scheduling platform with branded booking pages, calendar sync, payments, and automated reminders.
- [ShareFile](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sharefile/): Secure file sharing, sync, and e-signature platform for client-facing professional services firms.
- [Shopify](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/shopify/): An all-in-one commerce platform for building online stores, accepting payments, and selling across multiple channels with built-in AI assistant Sidekick.
- [Shortcut](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/shortcut/): Shortcut is a project management platform built for software teams, combining stories, epics, and iterations with native Git integrations.
- [Shots](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/shots/): Web design tool for creating device mockups, animated presets, and short videos from static designs.
- [SignNow](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/signnow/): Cloud-based e-signature and document workflow platform from airSlate for signing, sending, and managing legally binding documents.
- [Similarweb](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/similarweb/): Digital intelligence platform estimating website and app traffic, researching keywords, and benchmarking competitors and markets.
- [Simple Analytics](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/simple-analytics/): Simple Analytics tracks website traffic without cookies or personal data, hosted entirely in the EU.
- [SimplePractice](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/simplepractice/): All-in-one EHR and practice management software for therapists and health and wellness pros, covering scheduling, billing, notes, and telehealth.
- [Simplified](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/simplified/): Simplified is an AI marketing platform where the Riley agent plans, creates, and publishes marketing campaigns across social channels.
- [SimplyBook.me](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/simplybook-me/): Freemium online booking and scheduling platform for small service businesses, with a customizable feature marketplace and client mobile apps.
- [SingleStore](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/singlestore/): Distributed SQL database unifying real-time transactions, analytics, and vector search in one engine.
- [Sintra AI](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sintra-ai/): Sintra AI offers 12 pre-built AI agents that automate tasks like social media, copywriting, data analysis, and customer support.
- [Sisense](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sisense/): AI-powered BI and embedded analytics platform for building dashboards, modeling data, and white-labeling analytics inside products.
- [SITE123](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/site123/): A free, wizard-style website builder with built-in hosting, SEO tools, and an online store option, with custom domains as a paid add-on.
- [Sitebulb](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sitebulb/): Sitebulb is a technical SEO crawler and audit tool available as a desktop app and cloud platform, flagging 300+ issues per crawl.
- [SiteGround](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/siteground/): SiteGround offers WordPress, cloud, and reseller hosting along with an AI-assisted website builder and Coderick, an AI app-building assistant.
- [Siter.io](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/siter-io/): Siter.io is a no-code website builder with a freehand visual editor and real-time team collaboration, made by Designmodo.
- [Sked Social](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sked-social/): Unified social media workspace for scheduling, approvals, and analytics across 10 platforms, founded in 2014 in Melbourne.
- [Sketch](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sketch/): Mac-native vector design tool for UI/UX and product design, with prototyping, shared libraries, and browser-based team collaboration.
- [Skillshare](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/skillshare/): Skillshare is an online learning community with video classes in design, photography, and business, built around hands-on class projects.
- [Slab](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/slab/): Slab is a team knowledge base and wiki platform with a free tier for small teams and AI-assisted writing on paid plans.
- [Slack](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/slack/): A workplace messaging platform centralizing team communication through channels, direct messages, huddles, and thousands of app integrations.
- [SleekFlow](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sleekflow/): SleekFlow is an AI conversational operations platform centralizing WhatsApp, Instagram, and other channels into one inbox with AI agents for sales and support.
- [Sling](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sling/): Employee scheduling, time tracking, and team communication app for shift-based businesses like retail, hospitality, and healthcare.
- [Slite](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/slite/): Slite is an AI-powered knowledge base that stays synced with tools like Slack, Linear, and GitHub, and verified by the team.
- [Smallpdf](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/smallpdf/): Web and mobile PDF toolkit to compress, convert, merge, edit, and e-sign PDF documents online.
- [Smartlead](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/smartlead/): Smartlead is a cold email platform with AI agents, dedicated sending infrastructure, and a lead finder built to improve inbox deliverability.
- [SmartRecruiters](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/smartrecruiters/): SmartRecruiters is an AI-powered talent acquisition platform covering sourcing, ATS, scheduling, and hiring, with plans starting at $14,995.
- [Smartsheet](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/smartsheet/): Cloud-based work management platform combining spreadsheet-style grids, Gantt charts, automation, and reporting for project and portfolio management.
- [Smartsupp](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/smartsupp/): Live chat and AI chatbot platform combining a Mira AI agent with human operator handover for website and e-commerce support.
- [Smokeball](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/smokeball/): Cloud-based legal practice management software for law firms, offering automatic time tracking, document automation, and matter management.
- [Snappa](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/snappa/): Web-based graphic design tool for creating social media graphics, ads, and blog images from templates.
- [Snov.io](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/snov-io/): AI-assisted lead generation platform for finding, verifying, and emailing B2B contacts through multichannel campaigns.
- [Snowflake](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/snowflake/): Cloud-based Data Cloud platform unifying data warehousing, engineering, sharing, and AI/ML across AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.
- [Snyk](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/snyk/): Developer security platform that scans code, open source dependencies, containers, and IaC for vulnerabilities within IDEs and CI/CD pipelines.
- [Social Blade](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/social-blade/): Social Blade tracks public statistics and growth history for YouTube, Twitch, Instagram, Twitter/X, and TikTok accounts, with rank charts and earnings estimates.

- [Soda PDF](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/soda-pdf/): Web and desktop PDF software for editing, converting, merging, e-signing, and securing documents, with optional AI tools.

- [Sourcegraph Cody](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sourcegraph-cody/): Sourcegraph Cody is an enterprise AI coding assistant with codebase-aware chat, autocomplete, and search for large engineering teams.

- [Spendesk](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spendesk/): Spendesk is a spend management platform unifying corporate cards, expenses, accounts payable, and procurement with AI automation.
- [Spike](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spike/): Spike turns email into a messenger-style, conversational inbox and adds AI summaries, chat, docs, tasks, and video meetings.
- [Spline](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spline/): Spline is a browser-based 3D design tool for building real-time, interactive 3D scenes with physics, materials, and code export.
- [SpotOn](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spoton/): All-in-one POS and payments platform for restaurants and retail, bundling hardware, online ordering, marketing, and payroll tools.
- [Sprinto](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sprinto/): Automation-led compliance platform that continuously monitors controls and evidence to help companies achieve SOC 2 and other certifications.
- [Sprout Social](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sprout-social/): Enterprise social media management platform for publishing, engagement, listening, and analytics across networks.
- [SpyFu](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/spyfu/): Competitor keyword research tool revealing rivals' organic and paid search keywords, ad history, and rank tracking for SEO and PPC teams.
- [SQD](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sqd/): SQD (formerly Subsquid) is an onchain data layer providing real-time and historical blockchain data across 225+ networks, via a free public API and (upcoming) dedicated enterprise data portals.
- [Square](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/square/): All-in-one POS, payments, and commerce platform helping small businesses accept payments, sell online, and manage day-to-day operations.

- [Statsig](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/statsig/): Statsig unifies feature flags, A/B testing, product analytics, and session replay in one platform.
- [Statusbrew](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/statusbrew/): Social media management platform for publishing, unified inbox engagement, team approvals, and analytics across multiple channels.
- [Stormkit](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/stormkit/): Stormkit is a self-hosted deployment platform that automates Git-based CI/CD, positioned as an alternative to Vercel and Netlify.

- [Streak](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/streak/): Streak is a Gmail-integrated CRM that lets teams manage sales pipelines, contacts, and follow-ups directly inside their inbox.

- [Stripe](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/stripe/): A payment processing and financial infrastructure platform accepting payments across 195 countries, priced per-transaction with no setup or monthly base fees.
- [StrongDM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/strongdm/): Zero Trust Privileged Access Management platform providing runtime access control and session visibility across infrastructure and cloud resources.
- [Substack](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/substack/): A free publishing platform for paid newsletters, podcasts, and video, where writers keep 90% of subscription revenue.
- [Sudowrite](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sudowrite/): AI writing assistant built for novelists, offering a Story Bible, brainstorming, and rewriting tools to help fiction writers draft faster.
- [SugarCRM](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sugarcrm/): SugarCRM is a customizable CRM platform for sales, marketing, and customer service, with built-in AI insights for mid-market and enterprise teams.
- [Suno](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/suno/): AI music generator that turns text prompts into full songs with vocals, lyrics, and instrumentals.
- [Sunsama](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/sunsama/): Sunsama is a daily planner that combines task management, calendar timeboxing, and an end-of-day shutdown ritual for professionals.

- [Supermetrics](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/supermetrics/): Marketing data connector platform that automates reporting from 150+ ad, analytics, and sales sources into your BI tools and warehouses.
- [SupportBee](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/supportbee/): Email-based ticketing system that turns customer emails into a shared team inbox for tracking and resolving support tickets.

- [Surfshark](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/surfshark/): Surfshark is a budget-friendly VPN offering unlimited device connections, ad/malware blocking, and a bundled antivirus and ID protection suite.
- [SurrealDB](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/surrealdb/): SurrealDB is a multi-model database unifying documents, graphs, vectors, time-series, and relational data with ACID transactions.
- [SurveyMonkey](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/surveymonkey/): A survey and feedback platform for market research and data collection, with unlimited surveys/questions and AI-assisted analysis on team plans.

- [Synthesia](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/synthesia/): Synthesia turns text scripts into realistic AI avatar videos in 140+ languages, no cameras, actors, or studios required.
- [Tableau](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tableau/): Tableau is a leading data visualization and business intelligence platform for building interactive dashboards and analytics.

- [Tailscale](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tailscale/): Tailscale is a zero-config mesh VPN built on WireGuard that securely connects devices, servers, and clouds without complex network setup.
- [Tailwind](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tailwind/): Pinterest-first social media scheduler with AI content creation, SmartSchedule timing, and analytics for Instagram and Facebook.
- [Talend](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/talend/): Enterprise data integration, quality, and governance platform (now Qlik Talend Cloud) for building trusted, AI-ready data pipelines.
- [Tally](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tally/): Tally is a free, no-code form builder that works like a doc—type to create surveys, forms, and quizzes with unlimited free submissions.

- [Taskade](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/taskade/): Taskade is an AI-native workspace for notes, tasks, and real-time collaboration that also lets users build and deploy AI agents and automations.
- [Teachable](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/teachable/): All-in-one platform for creating, marketing, and selling online courses, coaching, and digital downloads.
- [Teamgate](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/teamgate/): Simplified sales CRM with drag-and-drop pipelines, a built-in SmartDialer, and sales analytics for SMB sales teams.

- [Teamtailor](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/teamtailor/): Teamtailor is a Swedish ATS and employer branding platform combining recruitment workflows with a drag-and-drop career site builder and AI tools.
- [Teamwork](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/teamwork/): Teamwork.com is an AI-powered PSA platform for agencies and client-services teams to manage projects, resources, budgets, and profitability.
- [Tebra](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tebra/): All-in-one EHR, practice management, billing, and patient engagement platform for independent healthcare practices.
- [Teleport](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/teleport/): Unified identity and access platform that replaces standing credentials with cryptographic, just-in-time access for infrastructure and AI agents.
- [Tella](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tella/): Tella is a screen recording and video editing platform for recording, editing, and sharing business videos from Mac, Windows, or the web.
- [Temporal](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/temporal/): Temporal is an open-source durable execution platform that lets developers write reliable workflows as code with automatic state persistence and retries.
- [Tenable](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tenable/): Exposure management platform that identifies vulnerabilities across IT, cloud, identity, OT, and AI attack surfaces, anchored by Tenable One.
- [Tettra](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/tettra/): Tettra is an internal knowledge base with an AI bot, Kai, that answers teammate questions in Tettra or Slack from company docs.

- [Thinkific](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/thinkific/): Thinkific is a no-code platform for creating, marketing, and selling online courses, communities, and memberships.
- [Thinkific Plus](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/thinkific-plus/): Enterprise tier of Thinkific with SSO, SCORM, AI support, custom analytics and dedicated onboarding for large training and course programs.
- [Thoropass](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/thoropass/): Compliance platform combining a licensed CPA audit firm with AI-assisted software to manage SOC 2, ISO 27001, and other framework audits end-to-end.
- [Threads](https://www.gappsy.com/tools/threads/): Threads is Meta's text-based social networking app, connected to Instagram, for posting updates and public conversations.
